nl_query: Which KEKs have already expired but still have DEKs wrapped under them that were created more than 6 months ago, and what is the scanner device name for any WORKSTATION-scope KEKs among them?
failed_sql: SELECT kek.id, kek.external_id, kek.algorithm, kek.status, sd.device_name FROM key_encryption_key kek JOIN scanner_device sd ON sd.id = kek.workstation_id WHERE kek.scope = 'WORKSTATION' AND kek.status = 'EXPIRED' AND dek.created_at < (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '6 months')
error: Validation failed (schema): SQL references unknown table(s): dek. Use only tables that exist in the schema.
